sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, number Float64, created_at DateTime, status String);
SELECT quantileExact(0.25)(number) - quantileExact(0.75)(number) AS quantile_diff FROM test_table WHERE status IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, quantileExact(number - 1.5) AS adjusted_quantile FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING adjusted_quantile > 0;
SELECT id, quantileExact(0.5)(number) AS median, created_at FROM test_table ORDER BY created_at DESC;
SELECT id, quantileExact(0.01)(number) + 50 AS adjusted_min FROM test_table WHERE number IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, quantileExact(0.9)(number - toFloat64(NULLIF(status, 'inactive'))) AS safe_quantile FROM test_table;
SELECT id, quantileExact(0.5)(number + CAST('2.5' AS Float64)) - quantileExact(number) AS quantile_difference FROM test_table WHERE created_at >= '2022-01-01 00:00:00' AND status IS NOT NULL;
SELECT quantileExact(0.5)(number) AS median_value, AVG(number) AS average_value FROM test_table WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY created_at;
SELECT id, quantileExact(0.5)(number) AS median_value FROM (SELECT id, number FROM test_table WHERE number IS NOT NULL) AS subquery GROUP BY id HAVING median_value >= 2;
